response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth (19 years in software development, mobile platform expertise, strong testing/CI/CD background), he fundamentally lacks the required people management experience—zero evidence of managing teams or direct reports. The role explicitly requires 2 years minimum in people management; his background shows only informal mentoring and teaching, not team leadership. His developer tools experience is also narrower than required (MCP generators, test frameworks, and infrastructure setup, rather than 3 focused years building compilers, automated release systems, or testing infrastructure). Recent employment instability (6-month tenure at re:cinq, current career gap) compounds these concerns.
strengths: Deep technical expertise across 19 years, with particular strength in testing (TDD advocate, created Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner) and CI/CD infrastructure (GitLab, CI servers, Docker, deployment systems)
Proven mobile platform experience including iOS app development at WatchUp and cross-platform work, plus track record of rapid domain mastery across diverse tech stacks

Strong culture of knowledge-sharing and mentoring shown through Selenium training program, refactoring dojos, workshops, and open-source contributions that demonstrate investment in engineer development
concerns: No demonstrated people management or team leadership experience—critical gap for a role explicitly requiring 2 years in people management with full-time people-leadership responsibility

Developer tools experience is narrower and less focused than the job requires; work includes some tooling and infrastructure but lacks deep, sustained focus on build systems, compilers, or automated release systems

Recent employment history shows instability: 6-month tenure at re:cinq, current career gap, and multiple shorter positions, raising questions about long-term commitment and ability to drive sustained team initiatives

key_factors.factor: Strong technical depth and testing infrastructure background
Recent employment gaps and short tenure pattern
